name: minimal
description: Clean, minimal design system focused on whitespace and typography
designMd:
# Design System: Minimal

## Philosophy
Less is more. This system strips away all decorative excess and lets content breathe through generous whitespace, razor-sharp typography, and a near-monochromatic palette. Every pixel earns its place.

## Colors
- **Primary**: `#000000` — Pure black for headings, CTAs, and high-emphasis elements.
- **Secondary**: `#374151` — Warm dark gray for body text and supporting content.
- **Accent**: `#6366f1` — Indigo as the single splash of color; use sparingly for links and interactive focus states.
- **Background**: `#ffffff` — Absolute white. No tinting.
- **Surface**: `#f9fafb` — Near-white for cards, sidebars, and code blocks.
- **Border**: `#e5e7eb` — Hairline dividers; 1px only.

## Typography
Use **Inter** at all times. Scale follows an 8-point rhythm. Headings are semibold (600) or bold (700). Body text is regular (400) at 1rem / 1.5 line-height. Never mix more than two weights on a single screen.

## Spacing
All spacing is derived from a 4px base grid. Prefer multiples of 8 (8, 16, 24, 32, 48) for layout. Use 4px increments only for fine-grained intra-component adjustments.

## Borders & Radius
Keep radii small: 4px (`base`) for inputs and cards, 6px (`md`) for modals. Avoid `full` radius on anything other than avatars and badges.

## Shadows
Shadows should be imperceptible — just enough to establish elevation. Never use more than one shadow level on the same surface.

## Motion
All transitions use `200ms` with `ease-in-out`. Reserve `300ms` for page-level transitions only. No animations purely for decoration.

## Component Principles
- **Buttons**: Solid black primary, ghost secondary. No gradients.
- **Cards**: White background, 1px `#e5e7eb` border, 4px radius. No shadow by default.
- **Forms**: Underline or minimal-border inputs. Label above field, never inline.
- **Icons**: Line icons only (Lucide or Phosphor). 20px default size.

## Anti-patterns
- No gradients on UI surfaces.
- No decorative illustrations in the chrome.
- No more than 3 font sizes in a single component.
- No colored backgrounds on sections unless absolutely necessary.
